heroImageAlt: People supported in our day hospice and community
heroDescription: Whether you have a question, want to find out more about our care, or need to reach us in an emergency, we are here to help.
mainHeading: We'd love to hear from you
mainLede: Send us a message using the form below, pop in to see us, or call if you'd like to speak to someone directly. We're a small, friendly team and we'll do our best to point you in the right direction.
formNoteMarkdown: We aim to respond within **5 working days**. If your enquiry is urgent, please call us on [01949 860303](tel:01949860303).
mapSearchQuery: Canal Lane, Stathern, Melton Mowbray LE14 4EX
